name: Norwegian Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cornstarch, salt (if using), and nutmeg.
2. Add the egg whites and skim milk to the bowl and mix at low speed until well blended.
3. Gradually add the ground beef to the mixture and continue mixing at low speed until fully combined.
4. Shape 18 meatballs using about 1 1/2 tablespoons of the mixture for each meatball. The mixture will be soft.
5. Place the shaped meatballs in a greased or foil-lined 9 x 13 pan.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the baking dish while still hot and transfer to a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
8. In a separate bowl, mix the cream of mushroom soup with the remaining 1/2 cup milk until well combined.
9. Pour the sauce mixture over the meatballs in the casserole dish.
10. Cover and bake at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 30 minutes.
11. Serve with vegetables and a garnish of the sauce. Each serving contains approximately 48 calories.
